data.title: Waymo Co-founder Says Tesla Has An Advantage In Race To Autonomous Driving: 'I'd Rather Be In Tesla's Shoes Than In Waymo's Shoes'
data.description: Waymo co-founder Anthony Levandowski is more optimistic about Tesla self-driving vision over Waymo's given the EV giant's wealth of data.

data.title: Intel Vs. Micron Technology: Which Chipmaker Holds The Edge?
data.description: Intel and Micron are competing in the semiconductor industry, with Intel facing challenges in partnerships and global markets while Micron excels with cutting-edge memory solutions and expansion into AI.

data.title: Super Micro Expands Liquid-Cooled AI Servers With Nvidia Power
data.description: Supermicro accelerating shift to liquid-cooled data centers, facing regulatory scrutiny for revenue recognition. Introducing advanced AI and storage solutions.

data.title: Dogecoin Rockets Up 10%, Shiba Inu Spikes 5%: What Is Going On?
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) are surging, with the former benefitting from social media chatter about Elon Musk

data.title: U.S. Bancorp Q3 Earnings: EPS Beat, Revenue Miss, Rising Credit Loss Provisions & More
data.description: U.S. Bancorp shares rise after reporting Q3 earnings of $1.03 per share, exceeding estimates despite a revenue miss.
